nasb.text: They are fat, they are sleek, They also excel in deeds of wickedness; They do not plead the cause, The cause of the orphan, that they may prosper; And they do not defend the rights of the poor.

esv.text: they have grown fat and sleek. They know no bounds in deeds of evil; they judge not with justice the cause of the fatherless, to make it prosper, and they do not defend the rights of the needy.

cnv.text: 他們肥胖光潤， 作盡各種壞事； 他們不為人辯護， 不替孤兒辨屈，使他們獲益， 也不為窮人伸冤。

ccb.text: 吃得肥胖红润， 坏事做尽，不为孤儿申冤， 不为穷人主持公道。”
